description:
A diminutive, curvy woman no taller than three and a half feet. Her skin is a deep purple, and adorned with glowing neon lines shaped like hearts and arcing lightning. Her luscious yet wild hair is a dark blue and ends in pinkish-purple tips. Notably, she has two pairs of horns, two tall ones arcing up from her forehead to part her flat-cut bangs, while the other pair tightly coils around her long tufted ears decorated with golden earrings.

Her short, almond-shaped brows and piercing ice-blue irises give her a threatening countenance, which is only compounded by the paint-splattered face mask covering her mouth most of the time, the black-and-neon fabric complimenting the equally neon-streaked and paint-stained hoodie she loosely wears over her scantily dressed curves, the open baggy garment showing off most of her body but completely covering her arms, leaving only her nimble-looking hands and long teal-colored nails visible.

Only a hint of her midriff can be seen past her tits before a tight business skirt barely hiding her hips comes into view, the formerly refined fabric purposefully torn in places and carrying spray paint cans hanging from jury-rigged holsters, while the center of the belt she wears over her wide waist sports a rather cutesy golden heart.

Past her dangerously short skirt, her plump thighs are covered in tight fishnet stockings whose leather welts show a golden X much like her bra, while more brightly glowing markings adorn her soft-looking skin all the way down to her feet, which rest within stout white sneakers.
encyclopedia:
Voltlin Livewires are voltlins who work for the Graffiti Queen, aka 'The Boss', in the Monster Girl Capital of Ars Delusia. Operating primarily in the Industrial District where they have their HQ, this gang of officially-sanctioned ne'er-do-wells are tasked with harassing Adventurers trying to delve into the Capital and acquire the Sigil of Intelligence, though they also perform a myriad other city-related services with varying diligence.

While possessed of a deep artistic and rebellious streak, they are otherwise much like the average voltlin: sex-focused, electrically-charged, demonic shortstacks with a propensity for tinkering and gregariousness. Nevertheless, they set themselves apart from other votllins and monster citizens in general by wearing distinctive, provocative Graffiti Queen-brand clothing, which they carry with an in-your-face pride echoing the deep respect they have for The Boss.

Of note, extended sexual exposure to voltlins and their lightning-infused magic may cause Rut in male adventurers, who are the preferred prey of Livewires.
